messages.content: Summarize a classic Provençal ratatouille recipe as a concise procedure. Include core ingredient ratios by weight, sequencing of cooking steps, pan sizes, heat levels, and approximate timings. No health PSAs, no anecdotes, no serving suggestions, and no substitutions; keep it strictly procedural.
